system.description: The character can work themselves into a state of violent frenzy, becoming a dangerous whirlwind of destruction on the battlefield.
system.benefit: The character may spend one Full Action to enter a Frenzied state. While Frenzied, the character gains +10 to Weapon Skill, Strength, Toughness, and Willpower, but suffers -20 to Ballistic Skill and Intelligence. The character must attack the nearest enemy in melee each turn and may not Parry, retreat, or flee. Frenzy lasts until the end of combat or the character is Stunned.
system.notes: +10 WS/S/T/WP while Frenzied, -20 BS/Int. Must melee nearest enemy.
